import { QrCode, RotateCw, LogOut, Signal, Filter, Download, Search, Play, Pause, StopCircle } from "lucide-react"; export default function AttendancePage() { const students = [ { roll: "2024-MB-001", name: "Aravind J.", initials: "AJ", start: "14:02:11", end: "--:--:--", status: "PRESENT", bg: "bg-blue-100" }, { roll: "2024-MB-002", name: "Bhavya Sharma", initials: "BS", start: "14:05:44", end: "--:--:--", status: "PRESENT", bg: "bg-slate-200" }, { roll: "2024-MB-003", name: "Chris Kovac", initials: "CK", start: "--:--:--", end: "--:--:--", status: "PENDING", bg: "bg-slate-200" }, { roll: "2024-MB-004", name: "Daniel Lee", initials: "DL", start: "--:--:--", end: "--:--:--", status: "ABSENT", bg: "bg-slate-200" }, { roll: "2024-MB-005", name: "Elena Solis", initials: "ES", start: "14:12:05", end: "--:--:--", status: "PRESENT", bg: "bg-blue-200" }, { roll: "2024-MB-006", name: "Frank G.", initials: "FG", start: "14:14:22", end: "--:--:--", status: "PRESENT", bg: "bg-blue-100" }, ]; return (

); }
